g.title: detonation_deadend
g.text: The detonation plane runs its own control loop. Every control↔detonation channel is store-and-forward through the pump. A compromised host reaches nothing trusted.

g.title: cluster_det
g.text: , separate physical node , own management network , non-nested HW , attested boot , bare-metal = firmware-burned

g.title: DCTRL
g.text: OWN lease store, OWN libvirt clients
- holds NO control creds / NO route to control

g.title: MGMT
g.text: are ALL detonation-local. Control never opens a
live connection into detonation and holds no
detonation credential - it only PULLS via the pump.

g.title: TRUST
g.text: passive tap + host attestation + (P2) VMI are
ground truth. The in-guest agent's self-report is
advisory: a benign self-report NEVER lowers a
